bench_setup.notes: EXTI trigger: PA0 (output) drives repeated rising edges, PA1 -> EXTI1. PASS after firmware observes 10 rising-edge pending events through EXTI_PR; FAIL if 10 events are not observed within the bounded pulse window. detail0 = detected edge count. AFIO_EXTICR1[7:4]=0x0 keeps the default PA1 route to EXTI1; PA1 is configured as input pull-down for a deterministic idle low.

peripheral_signals.notes: GPIO output push-pull. Wire: PA0 -> PA1.
EXTI1 input, pull-down. Firmware validates the EXTI pending bit rather than NVIC ISR delivery. Wire: PA0 -> PA1.
